payload.answer: The answer 'No conflicts recorded' is only grounded if the system actually checked the relevant conflict links or conflict records. Without evidence that conflict links were checked, the absence claim is not supported.

entity_resolution.reason: No entity resolution is needed for an absence/groundedness evaluation.

details: Strictly avoided treating an unverified absence claim as grounded.
Preserved ambiguity about whether conflict links were checked.

repair_options: Revise to: 'No conflicts were found in the checked records,' if conflict records were actually checked.
Revise to: 'I do not have evidence of recorded conflicts,' if no conflict-link check was performed.
Include citations or audit details showing which conflict links or records were checked.
